command.capturepoint.help.create: /capturepoint create <名称> - 在当前位置创建据点
command.capturepoint.help.setowner: /capturepoint setowner <名称> <所属> - 设置据点所属
command.capturepoint.help.clearowner: /capturepoint clearowner <名称> - 清除据点所属
command.capturepoint.help.list: /capturepoint list - 列出所有据点和区域
command.capturepoint.help.zone_create: /capturepoint zone create <名称> [依赖区域] - 创建区域
command.capturepoint.help.zone_remove: /capturepoint zone remove <名称> - 移除区域
command.capturepoint.help.zone_addpoint: /capturepoint zone addpoint <区域> <据点> - 将据点加入区域
command.capturepoint.help.zone_removepoi: /capturepoint zone removepoint <区域> <据点> - 从区域移除据点
command.capturepoint.help.zone_status: /capturepoint zone status - 查看区域状态
command.capturepoint.help.gui: /capturepoint gui - 打开控制面板 GUI
command.capturepoint.gui.hint: 使用据点管理器物品或右键点击据点方块打开控制面板。
command.capturepoint.setowner.success: 已将据点 '%s' 的所属设为 '%s'
command.capturepoint.clearowner.success: 已清除据点 '%s' 的所属
command.capturepoint.error.player_only: 此命令必须由玩家执行
command.capturepoint.zone.create_with_re: 已创建区域 '%s'（需要先占领 '%s'）
command.capturepoint.zone.removepoint.su: 已将 '%s' 从区域 '%s' 移除
